finding_results.notes: Recast Silas into a higher-contraction, dirtier improvisational rhythm with market-stall imagery and shorter blunt landings; sharpened Damaris into faster, copy-minded bursts with press-trade framing and reduced full-form drift; preserved Gideon's deliberate low-contraction formalism as the visible exception.
finding_results.summary: Silas and Damaris now separate by cadence and diction before tags, while Gideon's controlled full-form speech remains distinct.
